title: Create Sleep Goal
description: Create or update a user's sleep goal.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: minDuration
parameters.description: Length of sleep goal in minutes.

response_fields.name: goal : bedtime
response_fields.description: The user's targeted bedtime. The response is returned if the query parameter is used.

response_fields.name: goal : minDuration
response_fields.description: Length of the sleep goal period in minutes. The response is returned if the query parameter is used.

response_fields.name: goal : updatedOn
response_fields.description: The timestamp that the goal was created/updated.

response_fields.name: goal : wakeupTime
response_fields.description: The user's targeted wake time. The response is returned if the query parameter is used.
